description_long: This compact rifle features a predominantly matte black metal body with a distinctive tan-colored pistol grip, suggesting ergonomic handling. The upper section includes a tubular wire stock, likely foldable, which extends to the rear and is constructed from metal rods. The barrel is short and integrated into the main body, with no visible muzzle device attached. The trigger guard is prominent and the magazine is not externally visible, indicating it may be internal or not modeled. The overall design is minimalistic and utilitarian, suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact black rifle with a tan pistol grip and a wire-frame folding stock, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, the tan pistol grip, and the wire-frame stock extended to the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the width of the tan grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with the wire stock and grip visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the wire-frame stock and the grip's width.
